description.value: Price 25,320 gp; Slot none; CL 10th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate necromancy and transmutation DESCRIPTION An artful rapier with a lotus petal guard, this magnificent weapon is useful to warriors and artists alike. The tip of this narrow +3 rapier can be used as a mundane writing instrument, producing any color of ink the wielder desires. Once per day as a free action when the wielder confirms a critical hit against a creature with the Crusaderâs quill, she can inscribe an arcane mark on the creature. Once per month, the wielder can instead inscribe a mark of justice; this mark ends immediately if the wielder inscribes another mark of justice with the Crusaderâs quill. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 12,820 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells arcane mark, mark of justice; Special creator must worship the associated deity.
